arts.sum: Lavia was left out of Chelsea's Conference League squad, meaning he has had a full week of recovery ahead of today's game. Chelsea may have dropped a huge hint that Romeo Lavia is in contention to feature in today's Premier League clash with Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Nottingham Forest – Match Preview and Team News
arts.sum: Chelsea entertain Nottingham Forest at Stamford Bridge this Sunday, with the hosts searching for their sixth successive win in all competitions. During the week, Enzo Maresca’s side began their Europa Conference League campaign with a 4-2 victory over Belgian outfit Gent. arts.ttl: How to watch Chelsea vs Nottingham Forest - TV channel and live stream details
arts.sum: Maresca, who has won seven of his first 10 matches in charge after arriving from Leicester in June, made 11 changes to his starting XI to face the Belgian side but is expected to revert back to his usual Premier League team for the clash with Forest. Chelsea will be looking to make it six successive wins in all competitions when they host Nottingham Forest at Stamford Bridge this afternoon.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal & Chelsea have both held talks over £58m wonderkid transfer
arts.sum: Several Premier League clubs, including Arsenal, Wolves, Everton, and Chelsea, have been closely monitoring the development of 18-year-old Santos sensation Joao Pedro Chermont, CaughtOffside understands. Following their relegation from the top division last season, Santos are now open to offers below the talented young right-back’s £58million release clause to alleviate their financial difficulties.
